title: The set of Emerald
description:
Have you ever thought about playing Minecraft with emerald tools?
 That's what you're here for!
Here's a fantastic mod for you to use!
If you'd like me to add anything, let me know!
body:
The best set of Emerald ever created!    
Youtube channel: Filix - YouTube

Description
Imagine amazing equipment made of emerald!
Emerald armor is lightweight, durable, and offers excellent protection.
The emerald pickaxe is fantastic for mining. It cuts through almost anything very quickly and easily. Plus, it might help you find other amazing gems while mining!
The emerald sword is super sharp. It cuts through everything like butter and creates special effects!
 
With emerald equipment, you're fast, strong, and a little magical!
 
Every piece of armor give some healt:
Helmet = 4 max health
Chestplate = 7 max health
Leggins = 6 max health
Boots = 3 max health
 
There are some Totems:

Totem of life = give 30 max health

Totem of defence = create a structure around player

Totem are usable once for life, if you die you loose the upgrades.

Recipes of totem are in the gallery.

 
Recipes
